text_block_list.text:
Today is the Kinko Sho. But Matikanefukukitaru,
our rival for the day, has yet to show up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru is a little late, isn't she? I wonder
where she could be...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for keeping you waiting. I wanted to dress
up in something flashy to make a grand entrance!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm taking it up a notch, two notches
even. You see...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I've visited tranquil shrines over a hundred times!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I went to the heart of the mountains and stood
beneath a waterfall for five—no—six minutes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And finally, I went to the bargain store and
brought home a bounty of lucky goods!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Having absorbed all their lucky power... I stand
here transformed, as Full Armor Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
How was that, Bourbon?! I'm getting your shtick
right, aren't I?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Unable to compute. Please try again after
resubmitting information.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That's a little intimidating... but... but!

Blockading the path to T.M. Opera O stands a
towering wall of fortune. Meisho Doto must do
whatever it takes to overcome it.
